items.title: Zoom acquires GTM intelligence startup Common Room
items.note: adds buyer-signal AI agents to Zoom's revenue platform, deal closes in coming weeks

items.title: Agave raises $15M Series A to bring AI to construction financials
items.note: Accel-led round, automates AP and vendor compliance for 500+ contractors via two-way ERP connections

items.title: OpenAI publicly releases the GPT-5.6 family: Sol, Terra, Luna
items.note: Sol adds an Ultra subagent mode and Max reasoning-effort setting, Terra matches 5.5-level quality at half the cost

items.title: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1 and its first paid model API
items.note: agentic coding model with 1M-token context, priced at $1.25/$4.25 per million tokens to undercut GPT-5.5 and Opus 4.8

items.title: Bespoke Labs raises $40M to build training environments for reliable agents
items.note: Series A led by Wing VC with Anthropic, OpenAI and Meta insiders as angels, builds sandboxes that mimic real codebases and microservices

items.title: 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act becomes law, curbs institutional home buying
items.note: bars investors who own 350+ single-family homes from buying more, takes effect in 180 days

items.title: Ex-ironSource execs raise $27M seed for AI monetization startup Velocity
items.note: NFX and Red Dot Capital lead round building an ad and mediation layer for AI-native apps

items.title: PlaxidityX, Israel's $450M Argus Cyber Security exit, shuts down
items.note: Continental spinoff Aumovio closes the Israeli unit, laying off the remaining 80 employees
